creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
All good and welcome :)

Here's some cheatsheets to level up:

- https://wiki.freebsd.org/KubilayKocak/ThePerfectPortsIssue
- https://wiki.freebsd.org/KubilayKocak/Bugzilla/DosAndDonts

We're also on #freebsd-ports on the freenode IRC network if you need help, support or just to hang out and learn
